description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in casual attire, featuring a wide-brimmed sun hat that shades the face and neck. The upper body is clothed in a short-sleeved, fitted t-shirt, while the lower body is covered by cropped pants with a visible waistband and seam details. The figure wears low-top sneakers, suitable for walking in urban environments. The arms are extended horizontally, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly spread. The overall build is average, with natural body proportions and a neutral stance. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the face is mostly obscured by the hat.
description: An adult figure in casual clothing with a wide-brimmed hat, cropped pants, and sneakers, arms extended in a neutral stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide-brimmed hat obscuring the face, t-shirt, cropped pants, and sneakers with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hat's brim, the profile of the torso, and the relaxed posture of the arm and hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, t-shirt, pants, and both shoes, with arms extended straight out.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hat's brim, side profile of the body, and arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt, cropped pants, wide-brimmed sun hat
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
